category.readyDesc: Get started with your {{product}} — fast turnaround available.

signs.title: Yard Signs
signs.description: Professional yard signs for real estate, graduations, events, and business marketing. 24×18 coroplast. Single or double-sided. Stakes and gloss options available.

banners.title: Outdoor Banners
banners.description: High-quality vinyl banners for fences, storefronts, events, and promotions. Wind slits, pole pockets, and rope available. Fast turnaround.

decals.title: Vinyl Decals
decals.description: Custom decals for vehicles, windows, and branding. Work vans, food trucks, trailers. Logos, phone numbers, menus, QR codes.

magnets.title: Car Magnets
magnets.description: Magnetic signs for vehicles. 12×18 and 18×24 pairs. Easy to install and remove. Perfect for realtors, contractors, and small businesses.

cards.title: Business Cards
cards.description: Professional business cards. Standard and premium stocks. Fast turnaround. Design help available.

shirts.title: Apparel & T-Shirts
shirts.description: Custom printed tees, hoodies, and long sleeves. Gildan quality. Min 15 pieces. Mix garments and sizes. Perfect for brands, events, and businesses.

banners.name: Banners
banners.description: Vinyl banners for events, promotions, and signage

yard-signs.name: Yard Signs
yard-signs.description: 24×18 yard signs for real estate, events

decals.name: Decals

3x6.label: 3×6 ft
3x6.bestFor: Great for fences, vendor booths, and small events.

3x8.label: 3×8 ft
3x8.bestFor: Best for storefronts and medium promotions.

6x10.label: 6×10 ft
6x10.bestFor: Perfect for large events and high visibility.

250.bestFor: Great for small runs and testing your message.

12x18.label: 12×18 in (pair)
12x18.bestFor: Great for smaller vehicles and simple branding.

18x24.label: 18×24 in (pair)
18x24.bestFor: Best for trucks, vans, and maximum visibility.

sponsor.heroSub: Hustle Print Hub powers print for the HustleFanz community. Premium print. Partner pricing.
sponsor.programSub: The dedicated print lane for HustleFanz
sponsor.programBody: As the official HustleFanz print sponsor, we provide banners, signs, decals, apparel, and promo materials for hustlers, creators, vendors, and businesses. Fast turnaround. Premium quality.
sponsor.benefitsSub: Why partner with Hustle Print Hub
sponsor.benefit1Desc: Share codes with your audience for partner pricing
sponsor.benefit2Desc: Orders tagged to your code for tracking and reporting
sponsor.benefit3Desc: Faster turnaround for sponsor and vendor orders
sponsor.sponsorsVendorsDesc: Get exclusive discount codes. Offer print as part of your vendor package. Track referrals.
sponsor.creatorsDesc: Order banners, merch, flyers, and event graphics. Use your sponsor code for partner pricing.
sponsor.applySub: Get your sponsor or vendor discount code. Join the Hustle Print Hub partner network.
